input.question: How many classrooms are in each building?

payload.question: How many classrooms are in each building?

output.sql:
WITH counts AS (
  SELECT
    b.id AS building_id,
    b.name AS building_name,
    SUM(CASE WHEN r.room_type = 'Classroom' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS classroom_count
  FROM buildings b
  LEFT JOIN rooms r ON r.building_id = b.id
  GROUP BY b.id, b.name
)
SELECT
  building_name AS building,
  classroom_count AS classrooms
FROM counts
ORDER BY classrooms DESC, building;

visualization.description: Bar chart showing the number of classrooms in each building.
visualization.title: Number of Classrooms per Building

payload.sql:
WITH counts AS (
  SELECT
    b.id AS building_id,
    b.name AS building_name,
    SUM(CASE WHEN r.room_type = 'Classroom' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS classroom_count
  FROM buildings b
  LEFT JOIN rooms r ON r.building_id = b.id
  GROUP BY b.id, b.name
)
SELECT
  building_name AS building,
  classroom_count AS classrooms
FROM counts
ORDER BY classrooms DESC, building;
